subcodes.title: The True Meaning of Baptism by Water and Fire: Words spoken on 1911-11-08 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In the Gospel according to St John, Christ has said: 'Except a man be born of water and the Spirit, he cannot enter into the Kingdom of Heaven.'… The love of God is spoken of as fire, for it burneth away the veils, and as water, for it is the source of life
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان حیوان نبات حتی جماد جمیع حیاتشان باب است حتی حیات جماد باب شفافی منجمد
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @symbolism, @love and unity, @call to action, @spiritual baptism, @martyrdom of the Bab, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
